review: Was able to make reservations for a Friday date night. We were seated upon arrival. There is live music which definitely set the mood with the intimate lighting. Lots of menu options and most of them sounded delicious, I could hardly make up my mind. We ordered drinks and food which both came out promptly. Server was friendly and offered an alternative whiskey for my date when his preferred wasn't available. I ordered the tostones con carne- unfortunately, the tostones got quite soggy throughout my meal sitting in the juice. My date got the chaufa de carne which is kind of like a fried rice dish. I liked his meal both visually and taste wise. Overall, I would definitely return for another date night.
